event_title: Open Source GenAI Hands-On Workshops November 10, 1 Madison Avenue, NYC
title: Open Source GenAI Hands-On Workshops November 10, 1 Madison Avenue, NYC
description: [Enroll here](https://www.ibm.com/events/reg/flow/ibm/pov50imb/landing/page/landing) to participate in hands-on GenAI workshops on November10 in NYC between noon and 5pm to include: * Data Engineering for LLMs with [Data Prep Kit](https://github.com/data-prep-kit/data-prep-kit) * Unclocking Document Intelligence with [Docling](https://www.docling.ai/) * Building an Agentic GenAI App with [Langflow](https://www.langflow.org/) * [Granite 4.0 Model](https://ibm.github.io/granite-workshop/) * Generative Programming with [Mellea](https://github.com/generative-computing/mellea) We hope you will join us
